title: Caroline Abramo
compiled_truth: Caroline Abramo is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-05-02), Caroline Abramo sent 64 and received 278 emails, totalling 342 interactions. Top correspondents: [John Arnold](people/john-arnold) (26), [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (24), [Fred Lagrasta](people/fred-lagrasta) (10), [Paul Radous](people/paul-radous) (9), [Russell Dyk](people/russell-dyk) (8). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, abramo, deleted_items, enron, inbox, market.
